text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Permits and certs carry BOTH an expiry date AND a quantity allowance, and are consumed by quantity OR date, whichever comes first. On item selection the system surfaces permit/cert status. Two alert triggers: on selection AND at least one week before expiry, to handler + head. Regulated

chemicals (solvents, pesticides) require a ministry permit attached to the PO before it can issue; the order quantity is reserved against the permit's remaining quantity. A lapsed supplier cert feeds supplier suspension (ONBOARDED -> SUSPENDED), blocking new POs until renewed.
